title: cycnium erectum
intro: Cycnium erectum, also known as the 'Toadflax', is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cycnium erectum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Cycnium erectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
